title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at VMware India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at VMware India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
VMware India Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About VMware India Advisory Limited:
VMware India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VMware India Advisory Limited!
